_comment: One config drives the whole run: audit_site (pages), check_ai_visibility (brand/competitors/ai_queries), and score_report. Copy this to targets/<your-market>.json and edit. 'aliases' help match brand mentions/citations; 'domain' is used for citation matching and to link audit files to entities.
ai_queries: Who are the best climbing gyms in Nashville, TN?
Where can I go bouldering in Nashville?
Best climbing gym near Franklin, TN?
I'm new to rock climbing in Nashville — which gym should I join?
Climbing gym with kids programs in the Nashville area?
Tell me about The Climb Gyms in Nashville.

grid._comment: geo_grid.py geo-grid rank tracker (ADR-LP-001). rows x cols pins centered on the business, spacing_km apart; cost = rows*cols*keywords requests. 7x7 @ 1.6 km covers roughly a 10x10 km service area. Always --dry-run first.

paid._comment: maps_priority: only 'live' ($0.002/request) is wired; 'standard'/'priority' need an async task flow dataforseo.py doesn't have yet.
